subtitle: A practical thyroid-friendly reset for energy, digestion, and consistency.
shortDescription: Reset your plate, energy, and routine in 21 days with practical meal structure, prep shortcuts, and thyroid-friendly guidance you can actually stick to.
whoItsFor: Women managing thyroid symptoms, inflammation, fatigue, or bloating
People who need structure without strict perfection rules
Busy schedules needing realistic food systems
whatYouGet: Prep-day workflow and grocery list builder

faq.a: It is plant-based by design and can be adjusted for your needs.
No. The framework is built around accessible grocery-store foods.

faq.q: How fast will I see results?
faq.a: Many users report better consistency and less food decision fatigue within the first week.
